problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
mechanism: Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix
hypothesis: If Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix is applied to instability, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
